title: OutlineX
description: OutlineX is a lightweight Minecraft mod that highlights blocks with smooth, customizable outlines.
body:
# OutlineX ⭐

OutlineX is a modern Minecraft mod that enhances visibility by adding smooth, customizable outlines around blocks. Designed for builders, miners, and PvP players, it makes targeting and interacting with blocks more intuitive and visually clear. Instead of being stuck with plain white borders, OutlineX allows every player to pick their own unique color for outlines, giving full personalization.

## ✨ Why OutlineX?
Minecraft’s default visuals can make it difficult to clearly see what block you’re focusing on—especially in fast-paced gameplay. OutlineX solves this with high-quality block highlighting that feels natural and doesn’t clutter your screen. Whether you’re carefully placing blocks in a massive build, tracking ores deep underground, or lining up a hit in PvP, OutlineX keeps your view sharp.

## 🎨 Features
- 🟦 Smooth block outlining with no visual glitches  
- 🌈 Customizable colors per player for true personalization  
- ⬆️ "O" menu to toggle and configure features   
- ⚡ Lightweight, optimized, and FPS-friendly  

## 🛠️ Installation
1. Download the latest OutlineX `.jar` from Modrinth  
2. Place it in your Minecraft `mods` folder  
3. Launch Minecraft with Fabric Loader  
4. Press **O** in-game to open the OutlineX menu and customize your settings
